full_text:
Peng Yang (Yongnian) 彭羕 (永年)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Peng Yang (彭羕), styledYongnian (永年), was born in Guanghan. Friend of Meng Da, plotted revolt against Liu Bei. Repented but still executed. Peng Yang was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Peng Yang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
